entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Wild Pennisetum glaucum subsp. monodii and subsp. stenostachyum accessions used in the study

entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that infects pearl millet

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the pearl millet accessions were assessed

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist infection by Striga hermonthica

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW INCIDENCE
entities.description: The frequency of infection by Sclerospora graminicola in pearl millet

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration or date until the pearl millet accessions flower

entities.name: STRIGA EMERGENCE
entities.description: The observed occurrence and emergence of Striga hermonthica

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INFESTATION
entities.description: The process of intentionally introducing Striga hermonthica into plots
